[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 110110010 5
1 110100110 5
2 111100111 7
3 001100110 4
4 100011000 3
5 100010000 2
6 100110001 4
7 111111111 a

01 010000100 2
12 100001011 4
23 000010000 1
34 000100001 2
45 001001000 2
56 000000100 1
67 000100000 1
70 000000001 1

02 010001110 4
13 100010000 2 match 5
24 000110000 2
35 001001001 3
46 001001100 3
57 000100000 1
60 000000000 a
71 010000100 2

03 000010000 1
14 100110001 4 match 6
25 001010000 2
36 001001101 4
47 001001000 2
50 000000000 a
61 010000000 1
72 010000111 4
